nasb.text: He built twenty cubits on the rear part of the house with boards of cedar from the floor to the ceiling; he built them for it on the inside as an inner sanctuary, even as the most holy place.

esv.text: He built twenty cubits of the rear of the house with boards of cedar from the floor to the walls, and he built this within as an inner sanctuary, as the Most Holy Place.

cnv.text: 又建內殿長九公尺，從地面到天花板，他用香柏木板隔開，成為至聖所。

ccb.text: 在殿的后部，从地面至天花板用香柏木板隔出长九米的内殿，就是至圣所。
